generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataTransmission
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataTransmission
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataTransmission
]

instance MotorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "MQTT stream transmitting motor current, position, angular velocity, and derived torque data"
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor and gearbox encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current data measured by current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current and other parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural representation of robot system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, TraceabilityService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink simulation environment for friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data management and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of friction models and robot performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentificationInsight, ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computations for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification for improving robot motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control algorithms based on friction data for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction model performance and robot motion"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computational steps for model validation"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first vertical axis system"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100RobotSystem, FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, TraceabilityService
    base:desc "Environment for MABI MAX 100 robot digital twin"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction exists as the digital shadow is a passive entity with one-way data flow, not transmitting data back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data flow for continuous friction model identification and motion control improvement during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow integrates structural models (SysML), behavioral models (Simulink), live sensor data via MQTT, AAS for asset description, and a unified dashboard for visualization, enabling traceable data processing and friction model identification."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in the 'as operated' phase of the life cycle, continuously monitoring and updating friction models during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation is performed by comparing simulated data against reference measurements to identify friction deviations; specific verification methods or uncertainty quantification are not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor data from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards are applied for modeling and asset description."
]
